page.name: Color FX with FX on-off

pad1.name: `var 'colorfxpage' 0 ? get_text "FILTER" : get_text "CUT"`
pad1.color: filter_selectcolorfx 'Filter' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'red' : filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad1: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'filter' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'cut' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed

pad2.name: `var 'colorfxpage' 0 ? get_text "Noise" : get_text "Echo"`
pad2.color: filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad2: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'noise' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'echo' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed

pad3.name: `var 'colorfxpage' 0 ? get_text "Reverb" : get_text "Flanger"`
pad3.color: filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad3: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'reverb' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'flanger' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed

pad4.name: `var 'colorfxpage' 0 ? get_text "Spiral" : get_text "Mobius"`
pad4.color: filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad4: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'spiral' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'mobius' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed
page.pad5: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'pitch' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : nothing
page.pad6: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'vocals' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : nothing

pad7.name: `var 'colorfxpage' 0 ? get_text "Loop Roll" : get_text ""`
pad7.color: filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' ? filter_activate ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad7: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'loop roll' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : nothing
page.pad8: var_equal 'colorfxpage' 0 ? var_equal 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' ? filter 50% ? filter_activate & filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' : filter_activate on ? blink 300ms & filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' : off & filter 50% ? filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' : filter_activate on ? filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' & filter_activate off : filter_activate on & filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' & filter_activate off & filter_activate on while_pressed : var_equal 'colorfxpush' 2 ? filter_selectcolorfx 'distortion' & filter_activate on & filter_activate off while_pressed : : nothing

param2.name: `var 'colorfxpush' 0 ? get_text "ON / OFF" : var 'colorfxpush' 1 ? get_text "PUSH ON" : get_text "PUSH OFF"`

page.param2: param_smaller 1 ? var_greater 'colorfxpush' 0 ? filter_activate off & set 'colorfxpush' -1 : filter_activate off & set 'colorfxpush' 0 : var_greater 'colorfxpush' 1 ? filter_activate off & set 'colorfxpush' 2 : filter_activate off & set 'colorfxpush' +1
